issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text says 'during this turn' which means the effect applies only while it is your turn, not until end of turn.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
This Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle by Leaders.
[Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2 cost during this turn.
